response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile, experienced engineer with genuine low-latency and event-driven systems background, but his professional C++ exposure is minimal and dated (roughly six months at National Instruments in 2014-2015 plus a thesis project), with his systems work done primarily in DLang and his recent years focused on TypeScript/Node.js web platforms. The role demands 8-12 years of hands-on C++/STL development plus industrial-automation depth — MQTT, message brokers in an IoT context, IEC 62443 SDL practices — none of which appears on this resume, making him a poor fit for this specific position despite his overall seniority.
strengths: Real high-performance systems experience: low-latency services handling millions of requests/sec using async I/O, fibers, and caching
Event-driven architecture and distributed-platform experience (Geo-Data platform, microservices, Kubernetes deployments)
Strong mentoring and knowledge-sharing track record (workshops, courses, coding dojos) matching the role's mentorship expectations
concerns: Professional C++ experience is brief and roughly a decade old; primary systems language is DLang, not C++/STL
No industrial automation, IoT protocol (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA), or IEC 62443 / SDL secure-engineering experience
Recent career trajectory (TypeScript/Node.js full-stack, AI tooling) points away from the embedded/industrial C++ focus of this role

key_factors.factor: No industrial cybersecurity or IEC 62443 exposure
